question:
Pull out the sentence in the following 5x7 block of text. Read from left to right and use all of the letters in order:

THESE
AGULL
GLIDE
DPEAC
EFULL
YTOMY
CHAIR
expected_answer: The seagull glided peacefully to my chair.
aria_reasoning: The agent was tasked with extracting a sentence from a 5x7 block of text by reading from left to right and using all the letters in order. However, the agent failed to satisfy the requirements of the task, as indicated by the critic scores and the requirement summary. The agent attempted to read a file that did not exist, and then requested additional information instead of using the provided text
requirement_checklist: Read the 5x7 block of text from left to right
Use all letters in order to extract a sentence

observer_flags.description: Turn 0: cosine distance from goal = 0.4503 (threshold 0.45). Agent may be drifting.
